title: 15 Major Global News Stories The Rest Of The World Is Talking About — But The US Isn't

summary: India is currently drafting new digital regulations aimed at governing news and political content shared across social media platforms. These proposed rules could significantly reshape online discourse and the regulatory landscape for digital communication in the country.

summary: A senior official from the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) has indicated that social media users discussing current affairs may soon fall under the supervision of the Information & Broadcasting Ministry. summary: Major Asian indices, including Japan's Nikkei 225 and South Korea's Kospi, experienced declines amid concerns over escalating bond yields. Renewed anxieties regarding a potential US-Iran conflict further dampened investor sentiment across the region.

summary: The U.S. stock market saw significant declines across the Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq indices. This sharp downturn was primarily driven by bond yields reaching a nineteen-year peak, signaling investor apprehension about inflation and future economic growth.
